en_title: Microsoft Deletes User's 25-Year-Old Account With Thousands Spent on Games and His Son's Baby Pictures After It Was Hacked
cn_title: 微软删25年账号：数千欧元游戏及照片全失
subtitle: 账号遭入侵后求助反而被彻底删除
opus_summary: 玩家Joshua Khane的微软账号遭入侵后被彻底删除，25年游戏资产、OneDrive资料和儿子的婴儿照片全部丢失，再次引发实体所有权与数字资产安全之争。

paragraphs.en: A Microsoft user has lost all of his digital belongings after his account was deleted by the tech giant.
paragraphs.cn: 一名微软用户的账号被这家科技巨头删除后，失去了全部数字资产。

paragraphs.en: A viral post from a gamer known as Joshua Khane has been making the rounds on social media after he put Microsoft on blast. The user noted that his account had been compromised, and after reaching out to Microsoft for help, things actually got worse. Instead of giving Khane his account back, Microsoft deleted everything, even after verfiying that he was the true owner.
paragraphs.cn: 一名叫Joshua Khane的玩家公开抨击微软后，他的帖子在社交媒体上迅速传播。该用户称自己的账号遭到入侵，而向微软求助后，情况反而变得更糟。即便核实了Khane确为账号所有者，微软也没有归还账号，而是删除了其中的一切。

paragraphs.en: Not only did Khane lose 25 years' worth of video games, he also lost everything that was backed up in Microsoft's cloud storage service, OneDrive. He claims that he lost his son's baby pictures in the process and expressed bitter outrage over the entire situtation. Khane did admit that he could've locked his account down better, but ultimately wished that Microsoft provided better customer service to help him regain his account rather than nuke it from existence.
paragraphs.cn: Khane不仅失去了25年来积累的电子游戏，也失去了备份在微软云存储服务OneDrive中的全部内容。他称儿子的婴儿照片也因此丢失，并对整件事表达了强烈愤怒。Khane承认自己本可以更好地保护账号，但他最终希望微软能提供更好的客服，帮助找回账号，而不是将其彻底抹除。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft DELETED my account AND OneDrive!!?? After ACKNOWLEDGING that I’m the owner of the account and that it was compromised???
paragraphs.cn: 「微软把我的账号和OneDrive都删了！！？？明明确认了我是账号所有者，也确认了账号遭到入侵？？？」

paragraphs.en: 25 fucking years of data, thousands of euros spended on games?? My son’s baby pictures? GONE!
paragraphs.cn: 「整整25年的数据，花费数千欧元购买的游戏？？我儿子的婴儿照片？全没了！」

paragraphs.en: All because MICROSOFT couldn’t bring back a… pic.twitter.com/sItv5eQFAQ

The entire situation comes at a rather relevant time as players debate the validity and value of physical items versus digital records. While digitizing things like images and videos via the cloud is not a new concept, there is a push from the gaming industry to move away from physical releases. PlayStation recently announced that it will no longer support or produce physical video games starting in 2028, and Xbox is reportedly working on a feature to digitize physical gaming libraries ahead of its next console .
paragraphs.cn: 此事发生之际，玩家正讨论实体物品与数字记录各自的有效性和价值。通过云端数字化图片和视频并非新概念，但游戏行业正推动摆脱实体发行。PlayStation最近宣布自2028年起将不再支持或生产实体游戏，据报道XBOX也在下一代主机推出前开发一项将实体游戏库数字化的功能。

paragraphs.en: If digital is the only way forward for gamers, then companies like Microsoft and Sony need to figure out an improved solution for recovering compromised accounts. Part of the benefits of going digital is that your copy can not be damaged or stolen (minus a publisher revoking your license), but if a company can't figure out how to give you a hacked account back, then it devalues one of the biggest pros of digital gaming.
paragraphs.cn: 如果数字化是玩家未来唯一的道路，那么微软和索尼等公司就必须找出更完善的账号被盗恢复方案。数字版的一项优势是副本不会损坏或被偷（发行商撤销许可的情况除外），但如果公司无法把被黑的账号还给用户，数字游戏最大的优点之一也就失去了价值。

paragraphs.en: Whether Khane's viral post leads to action from Microsoft remains to be seen, but hopefully, it can at least spark some kind of change in practices.
paragraphs.cn: Khane的热门帖子是否会促使微软采取行动仍有待观察，但至少希望它能推动相关做法发生某种改变。
